title: Encrypted CDP command roundtrip
description: Verify CDP commands flow through the encryption layer end-to-end

steps.action: Daemon sends CDP command via sendCdpCommand('Runtime.evaluate', { expression: '1+1' })
steps.expected: Wire frame is { type: 'encrypted', seq: N, payload: '<base64>', nonce: '<base64>' } — no plaintext CDP visible
Plaintext is { type: 'cdp', id: N, method: 'Runtime.evaluate', params: { expression: '1+1' } }

steps.action: Extension encrypts CDP result and sends back
steps.expected: Wire frame is encrypted envelope, daemon decrypts successfully

steps.action: Daemon resolves the CDP command promise
steps.expected: Result matches the expected CDP response

steps.action: Verify sequence counters are correct throughout
steps.expected: Each direction's seq increments by exactly 1 per message
